utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I told the stripper to be here at five . That is good right ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You ordered a stripper for the shower ? ! That is totally inappropriate !

emotion_cause.span: 2_You ordered a stripper for the shower ? ! That is totally inappropriate !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What ? He is gonna be dressed as a baby ! Oh hi Mrs . Green !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am so glad you could make it .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yes , thank you so much . And again , we are so sorry . We could not feel worse about it .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Green
utterances.text: Try . There is my little girl .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah I know . Is not it great ? One less person we have to make small talk with .

emotion_cause.span: 9_Is not it great ? One less person we have to make small talk with .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Phoebe , Sandra mad at you too . It ... it does not bother you ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_Sandra mad at you too . It ... it does not bother you ?
